name: rpi4-sensevoice
description: Raspberry Pi 4 (CPU-only): SenseVoice offline ASR (zh/en/ja/ko/yue) via sherpa-onnx OfflineRecognizer.from_sense_voice. ASR-only transcription profile (no TTS) — SenseVoice serves the offline /asr path; streaming Paraformer also loads for /asr/stream. 'exclusive' policy bounds CPU pressure on 4 cores.
